ab: kyan utux suyan mu likuy, Takun lalu nya, mpu utux kawas nya.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Takun，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Takun, he is 11 years old.

ab: ms’un cami m’was biru utux pwasan biru.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: kinang ru suyan mu likuy ga sli cami m’was kwara.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: sli cu mosa mlngya, mhngaw m’was lga, mosa myan mlngya utux sali myan.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: sli cu slpyung, thoyay cami mosa m’was ru mlngya.
ch: 我喜歡交朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
